name: Honey Mustard Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 package Campbell's Dry Onion Soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the soup mix, honey, and mustard. Set aside.
2. Cut the chicken wings at the joints and discard any tips or damaged pieces. Add the wings to the soup mixture and toss to coat evenly.
3. Place the chicken wings in an oven-safe baking pan. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes, turning once halfway through the cooking time, until the chicken is cooked through.
